hero_title: Make Every Coffee Moment Feel Easy.
hero_desc: Blendy is designed for people who want smooth coffee, reliable taste, and comfort in every cup. From busy mornings to quiet nights, it fits naturally into everyday life.
hero_note_2: Balanced taste that pairs with any lifestyle.
concept_lead: Simple, approachable, and consistently satisfying. Blendy is built around comfort and trust—without compromising flavor.
concept_card_1_desc: A scent that feels familiar and calming, designed to blend into your daily routine without overwhelming your senses.
concept_card_2_desc: Not too strong, not too light. A flavor profile that feels smooth, clean, and easy to drink.
concept_card_3_desc: A product you can count on. Every cup is made to deliver stable taste, day after day.
